_doc: Phase 2 — Scenario Stress Calibration. Per-scenario peak-stress values for the indicators feeding the 6 cycle mechanisms. Senior Quant validates / extends each row before producer wires (Phase 2C).

_decisions_locked.context: 5 methodology decisions taken at Phase 2B kickoff before scenario calibration begins. All five locked via AskUserQuestion popup; Senior Quant + Lead Dev consulted, UX Designer and Data Steward will sign off at Phase 2H.

q1_pre_1996_proxies.rule: Use named substitutes for indicators that didn't exist before 1996.
specifics: HY spread (ICE BofA BAMLH0A0HYM2, 1996): pre-1996 use Moody's BAA-Treasury corporate spread.
Tag every substitution in source_note as 'proxy: <substitute name>'.

q2_pre_2014_gdpnow.rule: For pre-2014 scenarios, use the BEA advance-GDP release for the quarter aligned with the scenario peak in place of GDPNow.
specifics: Footnote: 'real-time forecast unavailable; realized print used'.
Already applied in seeded GFC '08 (Q4 '08 ≈ -8% advance print).

q3_sloos_quarter_alignment.rule: For SLOOS C&I tightening, pin to the quarterly survey whose period contains the scenario peak window.
specifics: GFC '08 peak Oct '08 → SLOOS Q4 '08 (released Nov '08).
Document chosen quarter explicitly in source_note.
Already applied in seeded GFC '08 + COVID '20.

q4_pre_2013_rrp.rule: Drop the Reverse Repo balance entirely from pre-2013 scenarios.
specifics: RRP facility launched September 2013; pre-2013 scenarios cannot have a meaningful value.
Set value=null and as_of=null with explanatory source_note.
GFC '08 seed must be re-seeded — currently has rrp=0 which mechanically scores as a stress signal and distorts funding mechanism upward.
Funding mechanism for pre-2013 scenarios aggregates over 3 inputs (CPFF, STLFSI, bank reserves) instead of 4.

q5_aggregation_when_indicators_missing.rule: Re-percentile available indicators against the live sample, then take the simple-average of the AVAILABLE indicators in each mechanism panel. Composite is the simple-average of mechanism scores.
specifics: Same logic as the live cycle-mechanism scorer in scripts/compute_v11_mechanisms.py.
If a mechanism's panel has 4 inputs and a scenario has only 3 calibrated, mechanism score = simple-average of the 3.
No bespoke per-scenario aggregation rules. No imputation from correlated proxies.
Backtest tolerance bands (±15pp per mechanism, ±10 on composite) apply uniformly across scenarios regardless of how many indicators were calibrated.

stlfsi.name: St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index

black_monday_1987.scenario_archetype: single-day equity shock from a strong real economy — financial-system shock without macro recession context. Calibrates over 16 of 22 indicators (6 series didn't exist in 1987: STLFSI [1993], ISM Services [1997], SLOOS [1990], SKEW [1990], MOVE [1988], RRP [2013]). Plus 4 substitutes per Q1/Q7/Q8 methodology decisions: VIX→VXO, HY→BAA-Treasury, IG→AAA-Treasury, ERP real-rate via 10y nominal minus contemporary expected inflation.

cape.source_note: Shiller CAPE bottomed near 13 Oct '87 from pre-crash ~16 (multpl.com / Shiller dataset)

erp.source_note: Per Q8 Senior Quant decision 2026-05-08: pre-1997 (no TIPS) substitute = 10y nominal Treasury 9.0% minus contemporary expected inflation ~4.5% (Cleveland Fed expected inflation series proxy) = real rate 4.5%. Earnings yield 1/CAPE = 1/13 = 7.7%. ERP = 7.7 - 4.5 = 3.2%.

buffett.source_note: Wilshire 5000 Q4 '87 ≈ $2.5T / GDP ≈ $4.8T = ~52% (pre-crash Aug '87 ratio was ~71% — record at that time)

hy_oas.source_note: Per Q1 substitute: Moody's BAA corporate yield Oct '87 ≈ 11.5% minus 10y Treasury ~9.0% = ~250 bps. Source: FRED BAA + DGS10. BAMLH0A0HYM2 series begins 1996. Tag: proxy.

ig_oas.source_note: Per Q7 Senior Quant decision 2026-05-08 (extends Q1 substitute logic to IG): Moody's AAA corporate yield Oct '87 ≈ 10.5% minus 10y Treasury ~9.0% = ~150 bps. Source: FRED AAA + DGS10. BAMLC0A0CM series begins 1996. Tag: proxy.

ig_hy_ratio.source_note: derived (150/250) — both legs use pre-1996 proxies per Q1/Q7

cpff.source_note: Post-crash 3M CP-OIS spread spiked. Estimate ~80 bps Oct '87. DRAFT — verify against FRED CPF3M minus FFTAR archive (CPF3M series may have limited pre-2001 history).

stlfsi.source_note: Dropped — FRED STLFSI4 series begins December 1993. Funding mechanism re-aggregates per Q5 over CPFF + bank reserves (RRP also dropped per Q4).

bank_reserves.source_note: WRESBAL ~$40B Oct '87 (pre-IOER era structural low — banks held minimal reserves; Fed didn't pay interest on reserves until 2008)

rrp.source_note: Dropped — RRP facility launched Sep 2013 (post-scenario). Per Q4 methodology decision 2026-05-08.

ism_mfg.source_note: Oct 1987 ISM Manufacturing PMI = 60.4. Economy was strong; the crash was a financial-system shock, not real-economy stress.

ism_svc.source_note: Dropped — ISM Non-Manufacturing (Services) PMI series began 1997. Growth mechanism re-aggregates per Q5 over ISM Mfg + GDPNow proxy.

gdpnow.source_note: Realized BEA advance GDP Q4 1987 = +6.9% (per Q2 methodology decision: realized print used pre-2014). Boom continued through the financial shock.

anfci.source_note: Chicago Fed NFCI spiked to ~+1.0 Oct '87 (post-crash financial stress reading; FRED NFCI archive — series goes back to 1971 weekly)

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL ~+8% YoY Oct '87 (pre-balance-sheet-as-policy-tool era; modest growth phase)

sloos_ci.source_note: Dropped — SLOOS survey began 1990. Liquidity & policy mechanism re-aggregates per Q5 over ANFCI + Fed BS YoY + M2 YoY.

m2_yoy.source_note: M2 YoY ~+3% Oct '87 (declining from early-'80s levels)

skew.source_note: Dropped — CBOE SKEW Index began 1990. Positioning & breadth mechanism re-aggregates per Q5 over VIX (substitute VXO) + eq-credit correlation.

vix.source_note: Per Q1 substitute: VXO (Black-Scholes-derived precursor; CBOE constructed retroactively from S&P 100 options) spiked to ~150 on Oct 19 '87 close. DRAFT — VXO Oct '87 reconstructions vary by source (range 100–150); 150 represents the panic-peak reading. Tag: proxy.

eq_cr_corr.source_note: 60d correlation derived from S&P + Moody's BAA-Treasury proxy (BAMLH0A0HYM2 doesn't exist pre-1996). Estimate ~0.70 in Oct '87 panic. DRAFT — needs reconstruction in Phase 2C producer using BAA proxy.

move.source_note: Dropped — MOVE Index began 1988. Positioning & breadth mechanism re-aggregates per Q5 (already noted under SKEW drop).

dotcom_slow_2000.scenario_archetype: pre-crash valuation/positioning extreme — captures peak euphoria, not realized stress (Dot Com Final Flush '02 handles realized-stress side)

cape.source_note: Shiller CAPE peaked 44.2 Mar '00 (record at time; per Shiller dataset)

erp.source_note: Earnings yield 1/CAPE ≈ 2.26% minus 10y TIPS ≈ 4.0% Mar '00 = NEGATIVE ERP. Investors paying for stocks below the risk-free rate — extreme valuation signal characteristic of 'Lead Up' archetype.

buffett.source_note: Wilshire 5000 / GDP ≈ 146% Mar '00 (record at time per Buffett's 2001 Fortune article)

hy_oas.source_note: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 ~470 bps Mar '00 (elevated late-cycle credit fears)

rrp.source_note: Dropped — RRP facility launched Sep 2013 (post-scenario). Per Q4 methodology decision 2026-05-08, funding mechanism re-aggregates over CPFF + STLFSI + bank reserves.

gdpnow.source_note: Realized BEA advance GDP Q1 2000 = +5.0% (per Q2 methodology decision: realized print used pre-2014)

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL ~+2% YoY Mar '00 (Y2K liquidity injection unwinding)

sloos_ci.source_note: Q1 2000 SLOOS net % tightening C&I = +17 (modest late-cycle tightening; per Q3 pin to quarter containing the peak)

skew.source_note: CBOE SKEW ~115 Mar '00 (elevated tail-hedge demand even during peak euphoria)

vix.source_note: VIX ~24 Mar 10 '00 Nasdaq peak (low for that era; pre-2008 VIX averaged higher than post-GFC norms)

eq_cr_corr.source_note: Equity-credit 60d corr ~0.40 Mar '00 (low — bull-market complacency, equity and credit decoupled)

move.source_note: MOVE Index ~115 Mar '00 (rate-cycle vol from Fed tightening)

dotcom_capitulation_2002.scenario_archetype: realized-stress capitulation — late-cycle credit blowup + earnings fraud (Enron/WorldCom) + telecom bankruptcies; SPX peak-to-trough 2000–2002 ≈ -49%

cape.source_note: Shiller CAPE ~21 at Oct 9 SPX trough (multpl.com / Shiller dataset)

buffett.source_note: Wilshire 5000 fell ~50% from Mar '00 peak; ratio ~85% Q3 '02 (vs 146% peak)

ig_oas.source_note: FRED BAMLC0A0CM peaked ~270 bps Oct '02 (telecom/utility credit blowup)

cpff.source_note: 3M CP-OIS spread ~50 bps Oct '02 (modest funding stress)

stlfsi.source_note: FRED STLFSI4 ~0.5 Oct '02 (modestly elevated; well below GFC)

bank_reserves.source_note: WRESBAL ~$40B Oct '02 (pre-IOER era; banks held minimal reserves structurally)

rrp.source_note: Dropped — RRP facility launched Sep 2013 (post-scenario). Per Q4 methodology decision 2026-05-08, funding mechanism re-aggregates over CPFF + STLFSI + bank reserves.

ism_mfg.source_note: Oct 2002 ISM Manufacturing = 50.6 (right at expansion/contraction line)

gdpnow.source_note: Realized BEA advance GDP Q4 2002 = +0.7% (per Q2 methodology decision: realized print used pre-2014 since GDPNow launched mid-2014)

sloos_ci.source_note: Q4 2002 SLOOS net % tightening C&I = +33 (peak tightening of cycle; per Q3 methodology decision pin to quarter containing the scenario peak)

move.source_note: MOVE peaked ~145 mid-'02 (telecom/Enron credit-induced rates vol)

cape.source_note: CAPE bottomed near 13 in Nov 2008 (multpl.com / Shiller data)

erp.source_note: Earnings yield 1/CAPE = 1/13 = 7.7% minus 10y TIPS Nov '08 ~2.5% = ~5.2% (Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 — corrected from initial 7.5)

buffett.source_note: Wilshire fell ~50% from 2007 peak; GDP modestly down

bank_reserves.source_note: WRESBAL ~$840B end-Dec 2008 (post-QE1 surge — Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 corrected from 0.74)

rrp.source_note: Dropped — RRP facility launched Sep 2013 (post-scenario). Per Q4 methodology decision 2026-05-08, funding mechanism re-aggregates over the 3 available inputs (CPFF + STLFSI + bank reserves).

ism_svc.source_note: Nov 2008 ISM Services = 37.8 (record low at time)

gdpnow.source_note: Q4 2008 advance GDP -8.4% (revised; GDPNow not live until 2014, used realized print as proxy)

anfci.source_note: FRED NFCI peaked ~4.0 in Oct 2008 (Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 — corrected from 4.5)

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL grew from $0.9T to $2.2T over 2008 (~140% YoY)

m2_yoy.source_note: M2 YoY ~+7.5% end-Dec 2008 (FRED M2SL — Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 corrected from 9.5)

eq_cr_corr.source_note: Equity-credit corr near 0.85 at GFC peak

move.source_note: MOVE Index peaked ~213 Oct 2008 (Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 — corrected from 260; original value likely confused with VIX peak)

q4_2018.peak_window: 2018-10-03 to 2018-12-24 (anchor: 2018-12-24 SPX cycle low / VIX peak)
q4_2018.scenario_archetype: rate-hikes-into-slowdown selloff — Fed QT + late-cycle ISM rollover + trade tensions; equity peak-to-trough ~20%

cape.source_note: Shiller CAPE ~28.4 at Dec 24 SPX trough (multpl.com / Shiller dataset)

buffett.source_note: Wilshire 5000 fell ~20% from Sep '18 peak; ratio ~138% end-Q4

hy_oas.source_note: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 closed 537 bps Dec 24 '18 (cycle peak)

cpff.source_note: 3M CP-OIS spread modest ~25 bps end-2018; funding stress contained

stlfsi.source_note: FRED STLFSI4 ~0.5 Dec '18 (modestly elevated, well below GFC/COVID)

bank_reserves.source_note: WRESBAL ~$1.6T end-2018 (declining via QT from $2.5T peak)

rrp.source_note: RRP minimal usage Dec '18 (~$1B daily, well below 2022 peak)

ism_mfg.source_note: Dec 2018 ISM Manufacturing = 54.1 (down from 59.3 in Aug; cycle peak past)

anfci.source_note: FRED NFCI Dec 28 '18 ~-0.40 (still loose but tightened from -0.7 in Sep)

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL ~$4.0T Dec '18 vs ~$4.4T Dec '17 = -9% YoY (active QT)

sloos_ci.source_note: Q4 2018 SLOOS net % tightening C&I = +6.6 (modest tightening; Q3 '08 peak comparator was +84)

eq_cr_corr.source_note: Equity-credit 60d corr ~0.55 Dec '18 (elevated but not panic)

move.source_note: MOVE peaked ~88 mid-Dec '18 (low by historical-stress standards)

buffett.source_note: Wilshire fell ~35% from Feb peak; GDP collapsed Q1

cpff.source_note: 3M CP-OIS spread ~140 bps before Fed CPFF restart

bank_reserves.source_note: WRESBAL surged $1.7T → $3.2T post Fed QE infinity

anfci.source_note: FRED NFCI peaked ~2.30 in late Mar 2020 (Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 — corrected from 2.8)

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL ~$7.2T Jun 2020 vs ~$3.8T Jun 2019 = +90% YoY (Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 — corrected from 75; original used Mar→Jun growth rate vs YoY)

m2_yoy.source_note: M2 surged ~+25% YoY by Jun 2020 with stimulus + Fed reserves (FRED M2SL — Senior Quant validation 2026-05-09 corrected from 18.0)

buffett.source_note: Wilshire fell 25% from peak; GDP nominal still growing

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL began QT, -3% YoY by year-end

m2_yoy.source_note: M2 contracted YoY for first time in decades

ai_2024.peak_window: 2024-07-01 to 2024-08-09 (anchor: 2024-08-05 Yen carry unwind / VIX spike)
ai_2024.scenario_archetype: single-day vol spike on positioning unwind — Yen carry unwind + AI capex doubts + ISM-Mfg sub-50; 3-week SPX drawdown ~9%

hy_oas.source_note: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 close ~388 bps Aug 5 '24 (intraday wider)

rrp.source_note: RRP balance ~$300B Aug '24 (well off the $2.55T Dec '22 peak; declining as QT progresses)

ism_mfg.source_note: Jul 2024 ISM Manufacturing = 46.8 (sub-50 contraction; trigger for Aug 5 stress)

fed_bs_yoy.source_note: WALCL ~$7.2T Aug '24 vs ~$8.1T Aug '23 = -11% YoY (active QT)

skew.source_note: CBOE SKEW ~140 average Aug '24 (chronically elevated through 2024)

vix.source_note: VIX close 38.57 Aug 5 '24; intraday spike to 65.73 (record short-period spike)
